name: Eye Strain Helper
description: Prevent eye strain without interrupting your attempts!

breakOnPlatformerCP.name: start breaks on platformer checkpoints
breakOnPlatformerCP.description: Allows breaks to start when you hit a checkpoint in platformer mode.

shouldIntegrateSafeEyes.name: Safe Eyes Integration
shouldIntegrateSafeEyes.description: Enables support for integration with the desktop program Safe Eyes. Requires the Safe Eyes plugin found in this mod 's git repository in order to work.

safeEyesBlockInLevels.name: Block Safe Eyes in levels
safeEyesBlockInLevels.description: Prevents Safe Eyes breaks from occurring while you're playing levels

safeEyesOverESHinEditor.name: Prefer Safe Eyes in editor
safeEyesOverESHinEditor.description: Unblocks Safe Eyes breaks in the editor & prevents Eye Strain Helper breaks while in the editor

fiveSecondInterval.name: five second break interval in editor
